newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Q1 FY2026 results (revenue ¥38.4B, EPS up YoY, helped by Schmidbauer and European xEV) and the updated mid-term plan were prior; the -8.0% pullback since June 9 appears flow/profit-taking with no adverse fundamental driver.

sources.label: Sumida FY2026 Q1 results & mid-term plan update (TipRanks)

verdicts.rankRationale: Already rank 1, no upside available. No new bottleneck evidence since June 9; the -8% pullback (thesis-intact) marginally improves entry asymmetry on this hidden-gem list. Direct magnetics/power-inductor supplier with low crowding and a tiny ~$0.3B cap keeps it at the top.
verdicts.bull: Hidden, sub-$0.3B-cap direct magnetics/inductor supplier for power conversion; lowest crowding on the list.
verdicts.neutral: Low-margin (net ~2.5%) but recovering; auto/xEV mix improving.
verdicts.bear: Micro-cap, thin liquidity, modest margins; xEV demand still soft.
